title: 关于前端启动问题
author: wuxiaoyang03
body:
pnpm start后报错无法启动前端页面，报错在下面，是不是nodejs版本问题
D:\java\know-hub-ai-master\know-hub-ai-ui>pnpm start

> @ start D:\java\know-hub-ai-master\know-hub-ai-ui
> npm run dev


> dev
> max dev

info  - [你知道吗？] 页面加载慢、产物体积大怎么办？试试做代码拆分，详见 https://umijs.org/blog/code-splitting
Mako https://makojs.dev is a new fast Rust based bundler from us, which is heavily optimized for umi and much faster than webpack. Visit https://makojs.dev/docs/getting-started#bundle-with-umi for more details if you want to give it a try.

title: DatabaseChatMemory.java中实现将会话记录持久化到数据库的代码中怎么好像没有在chat_conversation也创建一条记录？
author: hei-xiaohuihui

title: 你好，请问我的知识库为啥没有生效呢？
author: innerbboy
body: 效果图： 使用知识库： 补充： key过期了，新增加了一个key，参考：https://github.com/chatanywhere/GPT_API_free?tab=readme-ov-file 本地部署遇到问题： ! know-hub-ai-backend The requested image's platform (linux/arm64/v8) does not match the detected host platform (linux/amd64/v3) and no specific platform was requested 但是能够正常运行的。

title: 你好，请问支持ollama自部署的模型么？
author: kuschzzp
body: 你好，请问支持ollama自部署的模型么？
